HighlightPage.HL_SC_4_E_1: Add a few sprinkles of VOSÉ Concentrated Booster to your usual skin care products

HighlightPage.HL_SC_4_E_3: Not recommended for use with any products that contain fruit acid (AHA/BHA), whitening products or sunblock/cosmetic products.

BrandPage.BS_SC_1_DES_1:
Shilla Liew joined the beauty industry in 1993 and has built her expertise and professionalism in solving her customers’ skin problems.
She had challenging skin problems in her youth, and hence can empathize the challenges that her customers experience with their skin. As such, she devoted herself to develop skin care solutions -- with the hope to using natural methods to help customers achieve their desired skin care results.

The more she learned about the different types of skin and its characteristics, the more she understood how the skin’s natural immune system operates and the causes and effects that contribute to the skin’s natural immune system. 

 Shilla Liew observed that a person's skin’s health is inextricably linked to his or her skin microcirculation, and this inspired her to design and formulate then jointly developed with outstanding professional technicians in Korea with VOSE Concentrated Booster using natural herbs. The booster is meant to help regulate and normalize the people’s skin condition, while increasing the people’s current skincare products’ efficacy to give better results.
BrandPage.BS_SC_1_DES_2: Shilla Liew desires for simple and natural esthetics; her skincare philosophy is straightforward – using the most basic, natural methods to appreciate and reward your skin. Over the years, she has conducted countless skincare trials to gather customers’ clinical experience and data to successfully treat peoples’ skin problems. Inspired from the rose flower, she officially established the brand ‘Vose’ in year 2022.
BrandPage.BS_SC_2_DES_1:
Chris understands the importance of beauty and self-confidence to a woman. She was in the fashion industry for 13 years and had the opportunity to meet with women from different ages, walks of life and life experiences. She came to understand that the modern woman plays multiple roles in her life – and despite how time would leave its mark on a woman’s inner and outer beauty, a confident and strong woman can bring life and unmatched vitality from within. 

 Chris has been Shilla Liew’s close friend for a long time. She was the first few ones to sample the Concentrated Booster when it was first and was impressed with the booster’s efficacy and positive results it brought to her skin.
BrandPage.BS_SC_2_DES_2: Seeing how the booster is in line with her initial idea to help people develop their beauty of confidence, Chris proposed to start a brand with Shilla Liew so more women can enjoy the product for better skin health and self-confidence. She believes that it is God’s greatest gift and reward to her when she sees how happy and confident peoples are after using the product.
BrandPage.BS_SC_3_DES: Simple and natural esthetics. Our philosophy is straightforward – we use the most basic, natural methods to appreciate and reward your skin. Using natural herbs, our formulation concept aims to back to origin.Start from origin, 360 ° Comprehensive Anti-Aging.
BrandPage.BS_SC_4_DES: The ‘beauty economy’ is increasingly ubiquitous and modern mankind desires (beauty) appearance and health. VOSÉ strives for innovation, accountability, and excellence as we look to optimize the value chain with our ‘healthy, safe, natural’ beauty concept and products. It is our hope to be part of the people’s myriad and joyful life as we take care of their health and beauty.
BrandPage.BF_SC_1_DES: The microcirculation is for supplying skin cells with nutrients, moisture and oxygen, our skin relies on it to obtain energy for physiological functions such as metabolism, absorption, synthesis and repair. If the microcirculation in our face is not good and does not run smoothly, your skin will become dull and the moisture retention will be out of balance. The sebaceous glands are out of control, and other skin problems will keep showing out. At this time, no matter how much moisture and nutrition, it can only reach the epidermis layer, and cannot penetrate into the deeper layer, and it is the deeper layer that determines the quality of our skin.
BrandPage.BF_SC_2_DES: Especially for sensitive skin problems, if the microcirculation is smooth, it can help repair the barrier and enhance the skin resistance, therefore, maintaining the smooth microcirculation is also a very important skin care routine! With this principle in mind, the VOSE Concentrated Booster was developed to regulate and normalize poor microcirculation. When this issue is solved, the body’s metabolism will relatively improve, and skin’s condition will be restored to normal. Skin’s absorption function will also increase, allowing moisture and nutrients to penetrate deep into the skin for skin cells to be fully nourished for better results, and let you 360° Comprehensive Anti-Aging.
BrandPage.BF_SC_3_DES: Good and healthy skin is essential, and VOSE Concentrated Booster can help you naturally rejuvenate your skin and reshape your face.
BrandPage.BC_SC_2_F_C_1: VOSE Concentrated Booster was exclusively developed and curated to treat and improve skin health from its basics. The product’s natural herb formula using only the good, natural, and safe ingredients to nourish and balance the skin’s pH while increasing its absorption and immunity. Your skincare products now work better and more effectively, take you to explore and touch the essence of beauty, let you 360° Comprehensive Anti-Aging.
BrandPage.BC_SC_2_F_C_2: Rose Extract is rich in antioxidants that effectively neutralize free radicals that cause skin aging. Its potent moisturizing properties strengthen the skin's natural moisture barrier and effectively lock in moisture. Suitable for all skin types, rose extract balances the skin's pH and protects the skin's natural defenses against inflammation. Rose extract effectively balances, tones, refines pores, tightens skin, calms and soothes skin, while reducing wrinkles, promoting wound healing, blood circulation, and making skin healthy and delicate.
BrandPage.BC_SC_2_F_C_3: Contains various saponins and polysaccharides, ginseng is an emollient that softens and soothes the skin. The extract of ginseng can be slowly absorbed by the skin without causing any adverse irritation. It can expand skin capillaries, promote skin blood circulation, increase skin nutrition, regulate water and oil balance, and prevent skin dehydration, hardening, and wrinkling. Long-term use can enhance skin elasticity and regenerate the skin. At the same time, the active substance of ginseng also has the function of inhibiting the reduction of melanin, making the skin white and smooth.
BrandPage.BC_SC_2_F_C_4: Anthocyanin is a natural pigment derived from plants. It has strong antioxidant capacity, which can effectively remove free radicals in the human body, balance metabolism, and delay aging. It also effectively fights inflammation, slows down the formation of wrinkles, whitens freckles, keeps skin elastic, and protects against UV rays.
BrandPage.BC_SC_2_F_C_5: VOSÉ Concentrated Booster Concentrated Booster was developed by the founder Shilla Liew, and then jointly developed with outstanding professional technicians in Korea. South Korea is one of the world's leading manufacturers of beauty and skin care products. They have rich experience and professional skills in the beauty industry. They have a complete management system from product preparation to production and delivery, and at the same time, they can maintain quality assurance.
BrandPage.BC_SC_2_F_C_6: As a socially responsible brand, we do our best to reduce waste of resources. VOSÉ packaging designs are minimalistic and clean, allowing users to easily retrieve key information about the product. We also deliberately reduced the packaging’s thickness, so as to minimize unnecessary waste that could harm Mother Earth.
BrandPage.TP_SC_1_DES: Activate blood circulation, Adjust and absorb, start renergie, from skin hydration to barrier function, from sagging wrinkles to pigmented spots, from acne breakouts to healthy skin, from skin texture to radiance. A universal approach that works for everyone, Get healthy glowing skin in 1 month!
BrandPage.FQ_SC_1_DES:
We've compiled a list of frequently asked questions to provide you with more information about the VOSE products and the coverage we provide. 
 If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_1: How long can I store my bottle of VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_1: It is recommended to finish it within 6 months after opening it. Generally, the unopened product can be stored for 12 months under room temperature, and 24 months if stored in the refrigerator
BrandPage.FQ_Q_2: Who should use VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_2: Suitable for those who desire to have healthy skin; and those who have tried many types of skincare products but do not find it effective for them.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_3: How long does it take to see the effects of VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_3: This is very dependent on each user’s current skin conditions. But in average, one should be able to observe skin improvements within 1 to 3 months after using the product.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_4: How long can a bottle of VOSE Concentrated Booster last?
BrandPage.FQ_Q_5: Other than the face, can I also use VOSE Concentrated Booster on other parts of my skin?
BrandPage.FQ_A_5: Yes, you can also apply it on the neck and body parts.
BrandPage.FQ_A_6: Yes, VOSE products use ingrediants that are natural herb.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_7: Where can I purchase VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_7: Visit our official website at wwww.vose.me for more information and contact details.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_8: Can people with sensitive skin use VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_8: Yes. VOSE Concentrated Booster uses pure and natural ingredients. It does not contain hormones, fragrances, no alcohol and hence it is very gentle to the skin.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_9: Are there any special precautions before using VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_9: VOSE Concentrated Booster is formulated to work in synergy with any skin care products. We do not recommend using it with products containing AHA&BHA, whitening products, sunblock or cosmetic as this may promote skin more dryness.
BrandPage.FQ_Q_10: Why does my face has some product granular after using VOSE Concentrated Booster?
BrandPage.FQ_A_10: Because our product uses a molecular layering technique, the residual granularity helps your skin metabolize slightly.
